text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as it's my day off, I decide to head out and do some shopping.
While at the mall, I spot Tamamo Cross, standing still as if in a trance.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: T-T-T-Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Right on time! For real, ya got a gift there! Seriously! I can't thank ya enough for comin' all this way!
choice_data_list: W-we didn't have plans today... did we?
W-we didn't have plans today... did we?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: No, but your timin' couldn't be more perfect! I'm in a real bind, ya see!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Look at all these fancy-schmancy stores! How da heck am I s'posed to
know which one to shop in?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But look—I NEED a present for my parents' wedding anniversary! So
please, Trainer, ya gotta help me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My siblings are makin' our folks okonomiyaki to celebrate, but I can't
help since I'm here. That's why I thought I'd get 'em a present instead.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I don't got the cash for anything too crazy, but... ya got any ideas?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The "fancy" stores she mentioned would typically be considered
pretty easy on a student's wallet. So if those are outside the budget...
choice_data_list: How about getting them a box of chocolates?
How about getting them a box of chocolates?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many budget-friendly chocolate brands look just as beautiful as the
high-end stuff, and getting a box of chocolates still feels like an
occasion.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I should have enough money for somethin' that looks fancy! Plus the kids would never say no to candy... Sounds like a plan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that decision made, Tamamo Cross and I make our way to the
sweets shops.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
N-no way... Please tell me they forgot to put a decimal point in this
price somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I could buy five big boxes of regular chocolates for the price of this one piece of chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Who in their right mind would spend their entire snack budget on one piece of chocolate... WHO?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe it... I don't! Do people eat this pricey stuff on the
regular?
choice_data_list: Most people save it for special occasions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that such luxurious treats are usually saved for presents to
others, or for when you really want to treat yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Treat yourself?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've heard of the concept, but... people actually do it? Why? If you
have that much extra cash, shouldn't ya save it? I don't get it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But seriously, these prices... What's even a good deal? Do deals even
exist here?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Good idea. I don't wanna jump into a decision with this kinda money
on the line.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Phew... I feel like I can breathe again. Now, what should I get?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Since when are pancakes so pricey? I've gotta buy a present for my
folks, so I can't spend that much here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll just have a glass of water! I'm not that hungry anyway.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, are you ready to order?
choice_data_list: Two pancake sets with juice please.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: Thank you. We'll have that out for you in a moment.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey! Why'd you order for me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and I have been working hard on and off the track. So
I tell her that I believe we deserve a reward, which is why I'm treating
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course, it's not just a reward. These pancakes will also motivate us
to do our best in our upcoming practices and races.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I see what you're tryin' to do. You want me to experience this whole
"treatin' yaself" thing, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I still don't get what the fuss is 'bout, but... well, guess it's too late to
say no. Let's see what the hype's about!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... 'Sides, I'd have to be crazy to turn down a free meal of bougie
pancakes!

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting. Here's your pancakes and juice. Enjoy your
meal!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's 'bout time! These things sure are fluffy. Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Mmph?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(The richness that only eggs can provide is filling my mouth! No, wait,
it's fadin' into somethin' else...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(It's the whipped cream! It goes so well with the saltiness of the
butter... And the aftertaste is so light! I wanna eat moooore!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: DEEE-LISSSHHH!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer, it's so good!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I definitely get wantin' to eat like this more often, even if it is tough on the wallet.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I guess there is somethin' to this whole treatin' yaself thing.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still... I wish my family was here to taste these pancakes with me. The
squirts and my parents deserve a treat too, yeah?
choice_data_list:
I bet that's how your family feels about you,
though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If her family is anything like Tamamo Cross, surely they want to see
her thrive out here, eating delicious food and treating herself when
she works hard.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: They'd feel the same way 'bout me? Now that ya mention it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Brother
text_block_list.text: Hey! How come Tama gets an extra croquette and we don't?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Well, your sister took first place in the race, didn't she? She deserves
a reward! Tama, eat up and recharge for your next race!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're right... My folks were treatin' me all the time...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Which makes sense... Of course they want me to be happy. Geez...
why didn't I realize it sooner?
choice_data_list: Maybe it'd be okay to treat yourself more?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well... This feels like more than enough for me, but I'll think about it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I better get back to these pancakes! I'm not leavin' a single
crumb!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Newly free from the guilt of enjoying her fluffy treat, Tamamo Cross
dives in with renewed vigor.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Look, I want to finish these pancakes. I want to savor every bite! But I'm... I'm reachin' my limit... I needa slow down.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just so rich—not just in flavor, but in price... I know you're
treatin' me, but I can feel the money flyin' away. I'm gettin' chills...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like she doesn't have much tolerance for high-end
dining—even if we're just at a cafe. Still, she makes sure to finish
every last crumb of pancake.
